# Korean Market & Crypto Trends API

> Hourly South Korea market data for developers: Google Trends topics, KRW exchange rates, and crypto Kimchi Premium spreads.

This site is the public documentation and static origin for a RapidAPI marketplace API. Use the RapidAPI listing for commercial access, API keys, quotas, and billing.

Last generated: 2026-07-13T07:36:45.644Z
Current top Korean trend keywords: 노동조합, 삼성 갤럭시, 미국이란 전쟁, 동복댐, hd한국조선해양
Current USD/KRW reference: 1501.33 KRW per USD
Current Kimchi Premium snapshot: 2.74% average across 10 tracked assets

## Core API
- [OpenAPI schema](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/openapi.json): Machine-readable API contract.
- [API catalog](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/catalog.json): Product metadata, use cases, feeds, and endpoint list.
- [API metadata](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/v1/meta.json): Status, pricing entry point, data sources, and endpoint catalog.
- [Korean trends](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/v1/trends.json): Hourly South Korea Google Trends topics and related news links.
- [Kimchi Premium](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/v1/crypto.json): Upbit KRW versus Binance USDT spreads for BTC, ETH, SOL, XRP, and DOGE.
- [KRW exchange rates](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/api/v1/rates.json): USD/KRW and major currency rates.

## Commercial Access
- [RapidAPI listing](https://rapidapi.com/GERMANKBR/api/korean-trends-api1): Subscribe, get keys, and manage plans.

## Feeds
- [JSON Feed](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/feed.json): Feed-reader and automation friendly update stream.
- [RSS feed](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/feed.xml): Standard RSS discovery feed.
- [Atom feed](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/atom.xml): Standard Atom discovery feed.

## Optional
- [Full LLM context](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/llms-full.txt): Expanded snapshot for AI agents.
- [AI manifest](https://germankbr.github.io/signal-protocol/.well-known/ai-manifest.json): Well-known discovery metadata.
- [Repository](https://github.com/GERMANKBR/signal-protocol): Source repository and GitHub Actions collector.

Data is informational only and not financial advice.
